# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  IAM Role for Lambda functions with least-privilege access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch.
  Uses specific actions instead of wildcards to follow least-privilege principle.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment name for resource scoping

  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: myproject
    AllowedPattern: '[a-z0-9\-]+'
    Description: Project name used for resource naming and scoping

  AccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: AWS Account ID for resource ARN scoping (leave empty to use current account)

Conditions:
  UseCurrentAccount: !Equals [!Ref AccountId, '']

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-execution-role-${Environment}'
      Description: !Sub 'Execution role for ${ProjectName} Lambda functions in ${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !If
                  - UseCurrentAccount
                  - !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
                  - !Ref AccountId
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref LambdaPermissionsBoundary
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  # Permission boundary to cap the maximum permissions regardless of policy changes
  LambdaPermissionsBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-permissions-boundary-${Environment}'
      Description: >
        Permissions boundary for Lambda roles. Caps maximum permissions
        to prevent privilege escalation even if inline policies are modified.
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSpecificServicesOnly
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
              - 'dynamodb:GetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:PutItem'
              - 'dynamodb:UpdateItem'
              - 'dynamodb:DeleteItem'
              - 'dynamodb:Query'
              - 'dynamodb:Scan'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchGetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchWriteItem'
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueUrl'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
              - 'sns:Publish'
              - 'sns:Subscribe'
              - 'sns:Unsubscribe'
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
              - 'cloudwatch:PutMetricData'
              - 'xray:PutTraceSegments'
              - 'xray:PutTelemetryRecords'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyIAMEscalation
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateRole'
              - 'iam:DeleteRole'
              - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:DetachRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:CreateUser'
              - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
              - 'iam:PassRole'
              - 'iam:CreatePolicy'
              - 'iam:DeletePolicy'
              - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
              - 'sts:AssumeRole'
              - 'organizations:*'
              - 'account:*'
            Resource: '*'

  # CloudWatch Logs - scoped to specific log groups for this project
  CloudWatchLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-cloudwatch-logs-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to write logs to CloudWatch, scoped to project log groups
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogGroupCreation
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-*'
          - Sid: AllowLogWriting
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-*:log-stream:*'

  # S3 access - scoped to project-specific buckets
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-s3-access-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to read/write S3 objects in project buckets only
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowListBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
          - Sid: AllowObjectOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}/*'
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'aws:kms'
              'Null':
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'false'

  # DynamoDB access - scoped to project tables
  DynamoDBAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-dynamodb-access-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to perform CRUD operations on project DynamoDB tables
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowTableOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'dynamodb:GetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:PutItem'
              - 'dynamodb:UpdateItem'
              - 'dynamodb:DeleteItem'
              - 'dynamodb:Query'
              - 'dynamodb:Scan'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchGetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchWriteItem'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}/index/*'

  # SQS access - scoped to project queues
  SQSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-sqs-access-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to send and receive messages from project SQS queues
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowQueueOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueUrl'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
          - Sid: DenyNonSSLAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'sqs:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  # SNS access - scoped to project topics
  SNSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-sns-access-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to publish to project SNS topics
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'sns:Publish'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
          - Sid: DenyNonSSLAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'sns:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ProjectName}-*-${Environment}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  # CloudWatch Metrics - scoped to project namespace
  CloudWatchMetricsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-cloudwatch-metrics-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to publish custom CloudWatch metrics for the project
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPutMetrics
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'cloudwatch:PutMetricData'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub '${ProjectName}/${Environment}'

  # X-Ray tracing support
  XRayTracingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-xray-${Environment}'
      Description: Allows Lambda to send X-Ray tracing data
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowXRayTracing
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'xray:PutTraceSegments'
              - 'xray:PutTelemetryRecords'
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-role-arn-${Environment}'

  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-role-name-${Environment}'

  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Description: ARN of the permissions boundary policy
    Value: !Ref LambdaPermissionsBoundary
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-lambda-permissions-boundary-arn-${Environment}'
